problem id: 0520a6ec
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00101110 -> 00011100
  00001010 -> 00010100
  10000101 -> 00001011
  11011100 -> 00111001
  00101111 -> 00011110
  11110111 -> 00001111
  10000100 -> 00001001
  00000000 -> 00000000
  10101100 -> 01011001
  01011111 -> 00011110

query: 11010000
predicted answer: 10100001
